allow: Bash(sqlite3 instance/test_platform.db "SELECT id, name, name_ru, name_en, grades FROM subject ORDER BY id;")

Bash(sqlite3 instance/test_platform.db "SELECT subject_id, grade, quarter, COUNT\(*\) FROM question WHERE subject_id IN \(1,2\) GROUP BY subject_id, grade, quarter ORDER BY subject_id, grade, quarter;")
Bash(sqlite3 instance/test_platform.db "SELECT id, grade, quarter, lesson, substr\(question_text,1,80\), correct_answer FROM question WHERE subject_id=1 AND grade=5 AND quarter=1 LIMIT 30;")
Bash(sqlite3 instance/test_platform.db "SELECT count\(DISTINCT substr\(question_text,1,30\)\) as unique_starts, count\(*\) as total FROM question WHERE subject_id=1 AND grade=5 AND quarter=1;")
Bash(sqlite3 instance/test_platform.db "SELECT substr\(question_text,1,40\), COUNT\(*\) FROM question WHERE subject_id=1 AND grade=5 AND quarter=1 GROUP BY substr\(question_text,1,40\);")

Bash(sqlite3 instance/test_platform.db "SELECT subject_id, grade, quarter, COUNT\(DISTINCT lesson\) as lessons FROM question WHERE subject_id IN \(1,2\) GROUP BY subject_id, grade, quarter ORDER BY subject_id, grade, quarter;")
Bash(sqlite3 instance/test_platform.db "SELECT id, title, grade, quarter FROM control_work WHERE subject_id IN \(1,2\) ORDER BY subject_id, grade, quarter;")

Bash(sqlite3 instance/test_platform.db "SELECT cw.id, cw.title, COUNT\(cwq.question_id\) as q_count FROM control_work cw LEFT JOIN control_work_questions cwq ON cw.id=cwq.control_work_id WHERE cw.subject_id IN \(1,2\) GROUP BY cw.id ORDER BY cw.subject_id, cw.grade, cw.quarter;")
Bash(sqlite3 instance/test_platform.db "SELECT id, grade, quarter, lesson, substr\(question_text, 1, 100\) FROM question WHERE subject_id=2 AND grade=7 AND quarter=1 ORDER BY id LIMIT 30;")
Bash(sqlite3 instance/test_platform.db "SELECT lesson, COUNT\(*\) FROM question WHERE subject_id=2 AND grade=7 AND quarter=1 GROUP BY lesson;")
Bash(sqlite3 instance/test_platform.db "SELECT id, substr\(question_text,1,50\), question_text_ru, question_text_en FROM question WHERE subject_id IN \(1,2\) LIMIT 5;")
